description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was stopped at a red traffic light on Folsom Street facing 10th Street. When the light turned green, the 
Zoox vehicle proceeded forward, and the passenger vehicle behind the Zoox vehicle made contact with the Zoox vehicle's tailgate and rear 
sensors. There were no injuries, and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
